news.t: Checking the Style Box: Fidelity's Systematic ‘Beta-Plus' Lineup
ETF Prime: New Launches Surge Past 370 in 2026
Fidelity Expands Enhanced Suite With Mid- & Small-Cap ETFs
Fidelity Investments® Builds out Active Enhanced ETF Suite With the Launch of Four Small, Mid Cap ETFs

holdings.infoBox: FEMG is an equity ETF with a total of 147 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vertiv Holdings Co stock at 4.19%, Howmet Aerospace at 3.99%, Quanta Services at 3.13%, Monolithic Power Systems at 2.90%, and Cloudflare at 2.81%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Enhanced Mid Cap Growth ETF (FEMG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in mid cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US mid-cap companies exhibiting growth characteristics, selected from the Russell Midcap Growth Index. FEMG was launched on Apr 28, 2026 and is issued by Fidelity.
